name: CO_ASSIGNEE_TOP_PAIRS
description: List the most frequent co-assignee pairs across all patents.
cypher:
MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a1:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a2:Assignee)
WHERE a1.name < a2.name
RETURN a1.name AS assignee_1, a2.name AS assignee_2, count(DISTINCT p) AS co_patent_count
ORDER BY co_patent_count DESC, assignee_1, assignee_2
LIMIT 50;

examples: Which company pairs most frequently co-assigned patents?
